species.notes: P.B. Pelser (11-Jan-21): According to Wally Suarez (pers. comm. 5-Nov-19): plants in photos of this species by Cabactulan and De Leon from Mindanao have been misidentified as Appendicula torta Blume. The epichile of Appendicula torta is broadly triangular with distinct side lobes vs rounded with a broad sinus and obscurely three-lobed. Appendicula torta is not known from the Philippines. Ron Boos (pers. comm. 11-Jan-21) considers Appendicula crotalina and Appendicula torta to be conspecific. If correct, the name Appendicula torta Blume has priority. 0-860m.
